io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.title: Aident Loadout
io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.description: Use Aident Loadout to connect your AI agent to 1,000+ real-world apps and tools like Gmail, Slack, Linear, Notion, Firecrawl, and Fal, unlock 27,000+ executable actions, and track full audit history so your agents can get real work done reliably.
